calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Motion for Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order and Turnover Order
Motion is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Monica Wiley, not reported.

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion to compel answers to post-judgment discovery; and for award of monetary sanctions granted:
1. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Within seven days of the date of notice of service of this order, defendants shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's post-judgment interrogatories and request for production of;
3. Request for an award of monetary sanctions is granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of the date of notice of service of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
